title: Folders are needed in the Template Center
excerpt: In the Templates Center we have a lot of customized Templates.  It would be nice if we could organize our templates into different folders instead of having them all in one folder.

posts.author: cathy.locke (Cathy)
posts.cookedHtml: In the Templates Center we have a lot of customized Templates. It would be nice if we could organize our templates into different folders instead of having them all in one folder.

posts.author: jallred_fgi (Joseph )
posts.cookedHtml: We are running into the same problem! Folders would be so helpful.
